name: Rivals of Ixalan

draft.notes: If a foil appears it displaces a common. A double-faced card replaces the rare and appears in 1/8 of packs, always with a checklist instead of a land. Checklist rate (apart from DFC packs) at least 1/12. Land slot may be a basic land or checklist.

statedRates: Double-faced cards appear in 1/8 of packs.
sourceNotes: Small set. 7 double-faced cards, one variation of each standard basic land (plus two classic Ixalan land variations). 36 packs per box. Printed in USA and Belgium.
